name: The Sandesh Limited
summary: The Sandesh Limited engages in editing, printing, and publishing newspapers and periodicals in India. It publishes SANDESH, a premier Gujarati daily newspaper; and Sandesh Pratyaksha Panchang, a periodical. The company also operates Sandesh News, a Gujarati news channel; Spotlight, an out of home media solution; and a Gujarati news app. The Sandesh Limited was founded in 1923 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
